hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $env:GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT = if ($env:GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT }; node "$env:GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\ponytail-activate.js" }
